disclaimer: A real, branch-isolated replay cache: deterministic memoization with replay-bound cache keys, exact render reuse and lineage-aware invalidation. The cache turns the baseline's repeated rebuilds into one recompute per distinct workload - a measured reduction in recompute operations - while every output hash stays byte-identical, governance is untouched and stale keys are rejected. No hidden mutable state, no nondeterministic invalidation, no replay bypass, no artifact rewriting. Nothing is merged; human approval is mandatory. Replay-stable.
